EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The instance UUID of virtual machine "{object.name}" is changed on vCenter host {event_src.host}
An instance UUID is assigned to virtual machine "{object.name}" on vCenter host {event_src.host}
The BIOS UUID of virtual machine "{object.name}" is changed on vCenter host {event_src.host}
The BIOS UUID of virtual machine "{object.name}" conflicts with the BIOS UUID of another virtual machine on vCenter host {event_src.host}
A BIOS UUID is assigned to virtual machine "{object.name}" on vCenter host {event_src.host}
The instance UUID of virtual machine "{object.name}" conflicts with the instance UUID of another virtual machine on vCenter host {event_src.host}
